Comment: Lab 12 is specially design for use in a horn loaded enclosure engineered participants of the Live Audio Board Forum at prosoundweb.com.The design is posted on the Live Audio Board and is available to the public by visiting www.prosoundweb.com/lsp/ .The woofer is also suitable for more conventional applications where extended Xmax is desired.

The Crescendo 15B and 18B are intended for high level, high power low frequency reproduction in ported enclosures. They feature vented die cast chassis and composite glass fibre and black anodized aluminium coil formers, yeilding extremely low thermal compression. Both employ high rigidity cone membranes in order to offer freedom from breakup and associated distortion at extremely high sound pressure levels. Extended levels of linear excursion are possible due to long throw motor systems coupled with large flexure suspensions. ��Usable frequency range (-6dB) 33Hz - 2kHz

Comment: Designed as a high power, lower mid range loudspeaker, this unit could be advantageously incorporated into high power disco or P.A., multi way systems. ��Up to 5 KHz

The unique PD.2450 is a high power 24" cone transducer, designed specifically to provide powerful bass, sub bass frequencies.��This splendid unit has a 6" voice coil capable of dissipating heat build up when driven to its 1000 Watt input. A further advantage is the double suspension system, which maintains a pure piston action for the moving mass.��The PD.2450 offers a fast responsive sound and is an outstanding drive unit, suitable for all systems.   �30 - 1 kHz

Designed primarily as a mid frequency driver, the response of this speaker extends smoothly to 6.5 kHz. It is the ideal choice for mid range when supporting our 15, 18 and 21 inch bass drivers in near and medium field sound reinforcement.

Designed primarily as a high power, mid frequency driver, the large magnet gives excellent control and thermal compression properties. The PD.107 is the ideal choice when supporting our 15",18" and 21" bass drivers in high power systems which need extra power handling compared to the PD.102ER. It is equally well suited to direct radiating and compression (horn) loaded designs.
This is a general purpose 2.5" voice coil bass/low midrange unit, capable of being designed into a variety of multi-way systems such as P.A., keyboard or disco applications.   ��Up to 6 KHz

Medium resonance 300 Watts bass driver with a smooth response down to 40Hz in a reflex enclosure. It makes an excellent compact L.F. component for P.A. or disco and is also eminently suitable for multi unit compact bass guitar cabinets.

Performance optimised for bass guitar in single or multi unit configurations. The fast response provides a very "tight" voicing. Other applications would be the L.F. component in concert or disco systems when installed in suitably tuned reflex enclosures.   ��Up to 3.5 KHz

This speaker combines excellent bass performance with the advantage of mid range response extended to 4.5KHz. It is suitable as a bass/mid driver in PA or disco systems and benefits the bass guitarist who favours a bright, attacking sound in the higher registers.��Up to 4.5 KHz

Designed for bass guitar, this unit is similar in character to model PD 152 but has a 101mm (4") voice coil, more powerful magnet system and power handling uprated to 400 watts. Other bass applications in tuned enclosures would be P.A., concert sound reinforcement and disco.��Designed for bass guitar, this unit is similar in character to model PD 152 but has a 101mm (4") voice coil, more powerful magnet system and power handling uprated to 400 watts. Other bass applications in tuned enclosures would be P.A., concert sound reinforcement and disco.

The PD.1550 is a high power, high efficiency cone transducer designed specifically to provide powerful and accurate bass frequencies with minimal distortion and power compression.��Research has resulted in the development of an advanced magnetic assembly which incorporates a composite alloy and steel pole piece giving a uniform and stable magnetic field, improving linear excursion and providing an efficient thermal path to dissipate the heat produced by the voice coil. The motor assembly generates a BL product of 26T/M which is exceptional for a transducer of this type. It is this approach which contributes to the speed, accuracy and fidelity of the unit and maintains control of the cone under the most demanding operating conditions.��Manufacturing tolerances are extremely high and are combined with stringent quality control procedures whilst each component of the PD.1550 is selected to give exemplary electro-acoustic performance and long term reliability in all types of professional applications.��The PD.1550 is suitable for both sound reinforcement and high power studio monitors in a variety of enclosure types since it allows enclosure designers considerably more freedom with specialised loading techniques without having to make the allowances for physical characteristics or power handling limitations which are typically the result of more traditional designs.

This unit features a sophisticated dual suspension (dual spider) combined with a unique 115mm (4.5") voice coil. The large surface area of the copper windings in the voice coil assists in dissipating the heat generated by high power inputs which allows high power handling and reduced thermal compression. The cone and voice coil components are maintained in pure piston motion even when complex signals are applied upto the rated power. Combined with close engineering tolerances, these features allow for substantial short-term transient overload without damage. Performance is optimised for concert and disco systems, P.A., keyboard L.F. and bass guitar when operating in reflex systems.      ��Up to 1.5 KHz

Model PD158 is a 600 watts bass/sub bass driver incorporating a 4" voice coil and double suspension. Designed to work in horn-loaded enclosures the PD158 is also an excellent choice when used in a suitably tuned reflex enclosure.��40 to 3 KHz

A 400 watts P.A., concert or disco system, bass drive unit whose performance characteristics can be optimised by reflex loading. The excellent definition and response speed at the lowest audio frequencies make this drive unit eminently suitable as the bass component in monitoring systems.��Up to 2.5 KHz

This splendid 18 inch, low frequency unit has a massive 125mm (5") voice coil, capable of dissipating the tremendous heat build up when driven in concert conditions up to, and for short duration beyond, its 600 watt input. A further valuable consideration is the huge copper area and breathing arrangement of the voice coil which ensures superior power compression performance. A further advantage is the double suspension (dual spider) system, which maintains a pure piston action for the moving mass even when driven with the most complex programme input signals. This is an outstanding, very high power bass and sub bass drive unit suitable for all systems demanding the best possible L.F���Upto 2Khz�

Our designer's brief was to create a driver that offered superb performance when used in either a horn-loaded or reflex enclosure. The PD188 meets these exacting criteria. This low frequency unit has a 4" voice coil capable of dissipating heat build up. A further advantage is the double suspension which ensures pure piston action.���

The PD.2150 is a unique high power, high efficiency cone transducer designed specifically to provide powerful and accurate low and sub-bass frequencies with minimal distortion and power compression.��It features a 152mm (6") voice coil assembly, the largest ever employed in a cone transducer. This forms the heart of the magnetic assembly and, when coupled with the 305mm (12") ceramic magnet, results in a motor of unprecedented power. (EL product 34T/M).��Research has resulted in the development of an advanced magnetic assembly which incorporates a composite alloy and steel pole piece giving a uniform and stable magnetic field, improving linear excursion and providing an efficient thermal path to dissipate the heat produced by the voice coil. A sophisticated double suspension maintains pure axial movement ensuring that the voice coil is correctly centred at all times. It is this approach which contributes to the speed, accuracy and fidelity of the unit and maintains control of the cone under the most demanding operating conditions. Manufacturing tolerances are extremely high and are combined with stringent quality control procedures whilst each component of the PD.2150 is selected to give exemplary electro-acoustic performance and long term reliability in all types ofprofes- sional applications.��The PD.2150 is an outstanding transducer. Designed for use in sound reinforcement and high power studio monitors, it serves an otherwise neglected area of low frequency transducer technology. It allows enclosure designers considerably more freedom with enclosure design and loading techniques without having to make the allowances for physical characteristics or power handling limitations which are typically the result of more traditional designs.   ��30 - 1000 Hz

Fast responsive sound provides "tight" voicing. The PD.912 is designed as an all purpose 300 Watt, 3" voice coil driver, capable of being designed into a variety of multi-way systems, such as P.A. and disco applications.�50 to 3.5 KHz

The PD.915 is designed as a high power full range driver. The smooth extended response provides optimum performance for concert, P.A. and disco systems. Stringent quality control procedures ensure long term reliability and performance

Each component of the PD.918 is selected to give exemplary acoustic performance. Designed as a high power, full range speaker the PD.918 employs a 4" copper voice coil and a dual suspension system, mounted on a rigid die cast aluminium chassis.��40 to 3 KHz

The PD.1850 is suitable for both sound reinforcement and high power studio monitors in a variety of enclosure types since it allows enclosure designers considerably more freedom with specialised loading techniques without having to make the allowances for physical characteristics or power handling limitations which are typically the result of more traditional designs.   ��www.bkelec.co.uk
Powerhandling: 100/250 Watts     �Frequency Range: up to 3500 Hz

Automotive Line - Free Air - Sub Woofer 10SW1 - 10"��A 10" automotive subwoofer, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low frequencies on the vehicle cover. This, however, does not prevent that the 10SW1 be installed in acoustic boxes, which enables a better bass response, with a smaller cone displacement, that is: better performance with higher durability. The subwoofer features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light and from excessive moisture and dust.��The frame in steel plate features a new design, more reinforced and with a finishing in epoxy paint, providing the 10SW1 a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity. The new connection terminals, gold plated, are comfortable to use and ensure a perfect contact on the connections. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt of distortions. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays.��The cap, manufactured in special fabric, provides the product with a better performance, enhancing its design. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape. The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly with great linearity on the excursion and high damping at low frequencies.���The use of high resistance adhesives ensures to the components an excellent pasting and great durability. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.

A 12" automotive subwoofer, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low frequencies on the vehicle cover. This, however, does not prevent that the 12SW1 be installed in acoustic boxes, which enables a better bass response, with a smaller cone displacement, that is: better performance with higher durability.��The subwoofer features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light and from excessive moisture and dust.The frame in steel plate features a new design, more reinforced and with a finishing in epoxy paint, providing the 12SW1 a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity.��The new connection terminals, gold plated, are comfortable to use and ensure a perfect contact on the connections. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays. The cap, manufactured with special fabric, provides the product a better performance, enhancing its design. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape. The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly a great linearity on the excursion and a high damping at low frequencies. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.

Automotive Line - Bass - Mid Range 4MR2 - 4"��A Mid Range, with 40 H.M.S. of impedance, specially developer to reproduce the frequencies of the audio specter that are placed between the deep and acute sounds, in other words the zone of mediums. The loudspeakers kind MID-Range must work with other speakers able to reproduce the low frequencies, besides the tweeters, that will reproduce the superior extremity of the audible specter. The SELENIUM's MID-RANGES are projected to produce a fiddle answer, with low distortion levels and free from undesirable colors.��The use of high technology materials on the cones, Kapton� in the shape of the reels and resistant adhesives and high temperatures guarantee the high development and the big reliability of the MID-RANGES made by SELENIUM.�The suspension ring, the high compliance, it's made of latex with polychloroprene base, being adequate to the stationary ways muffling lone using long-fiber cellulose, adequate to produce excellent frequency answer in the work circle.��The reel has Kapton� body and copper wire plastered with special polish to stand high temperatures.�They may be installed on door or panels, preferably turned to the listener, since the directionality becomes quite accentuated in to the listener, since the directionality becomes quite accentuated in this frequency circle (and above it).���They need frequency divisors (crossovers) actives and passives to avoid damage that would be certainly provoked by the low frequencies.��100-10000 Hz

The loudspeaker features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moistures and dust. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability.��90 - 12000 Hz
